description_long: This is a large, modern residential house surrounded by a dense hedge, forming a private courtyard. The structure features a flat roof with multiple skylights and rooftop elements, and the exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray materials with large glass windows. The property includes a spacious backyard with a wooden deck, outdoor seating, and a circular hot tub, as well as a tennis or sports court. The front of the house has a prominent driveway and entryway, with a covered porch and wide steps leading to the main door. The layout is open and expansive, with multiple rooms visible through the large windows and glass doors. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A large, modern house with a flat roof, expansive glass windows, and a private courtyard surrounded by hedges. Features include a wooden deck, hot tub, sports court, and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above the front, highlighting the main entryway, driveway, and the symmetrical layout of the building within the hedge.
description_view_1: View 1 reveals the backyard with a wooden deck, circular hot tub, and a sports court, as well as the open-plan interior spaces.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear facade, showcasing the flat roof, rooftop features, and the hedge enclosure, with less emphasis on the entryway.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a side perspective, displaying the sports court, deck, and the connection between the house and outdoor amenities.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, covered entryway with steps, a prominent main door, and a minimalist porch integrated into the facade
